title: neanotis tenuifolia
intro: Neanotis tenuifolia, also known as the slender wakerobin, is a flowering plant species in the family Gentianaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Neanotis tenuifolia include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
